name: ZIP archive to Markdown conversion
prompt: Convert this ZIP archive at ./archive/documents.zip to markdown.
expected_behavior: Iterate over and convert all contents
success_criteria: Recursively converts all supported files in archive
edge_cases: Very large ZIP (>100MB) → may take significant time, consider extracting specific files first
ZIP with unsupported file types → markitdown skips them or produces placeholder
Password-protected ZIP → cannot be processed without password
